productDisplayName: Ben 10 Boys Crew Navy Blue and Green T-shirt
description: Style NoteStretchy and comfy room-to-grow style t-shirt from ben 10, a pint-sized version of his dad's T-shirt. The go-to piece for summertime games and fun, this tee will last longer than his scruffy escapades!Product DetailsNavy blue and green t-shirt, has a round ribbed neck, short raglan sleeves, graphic and rubber print on the front, branding appliqued on the left sleeve and brand tag above the left hemMaterial and Care100% CottonHand wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededLine dryCool iron do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
